news.title: It was the world’s hottest stock market. Now South Korea’s stock market has entered bear-market territory
news.summary: The cumulative impact of several different narratives – competition, sustainability, excessive leverage, international outflows- has sapped the Korean market of its upward mobility since clocking up a record high in June.
